events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: this fails. Staging fixtures to rely on the ceiling grid alone (no support wires back to structure) violates NEC 410.36(B), which requires fixtures in suspended ceilings to be independently supported — the grid and its hanger wires aren't rated for fixture weight, risking tee deflection or a dropped fixture. Since work hasn't started, the fix is cheap: add corner support wires anchored to structure before setting fixtures, then proceed.
